title: system time and date in the UI
excerpt: I work in Monday full screen, so I don’t see the system date and time in the Windows task bar. I would love for an option to show it up at the top of the UI, perhaps near the Inbox icon.

posts.author: shayroberts (Shay Roberts)
posts.cookedHtml: I work in Monday full screen, so I don’t see the system date and time in the Windows task bar. I would love for an option to show it up at the top of the UI, perhaps near the Inbox icon.
